notes: Round-3 beat-best stab: 3-way equal-weight logit-space ensemble of sub 33 (item-text kNN within subject), sub 32 (Ridge on item text), and sub 21 (smoothed subject_mean lookup). z_final = (z33 + z32 + z21) / 3. Prior tries: sub 45 (prob mean of 33+32) = -0.61; sub 54 (logit mean of 33+32) = -0.60. The new ingredient is sub 21 as a third channel providing pure subject-prior diversity (no item signal). No labeling.py (random platform fallback).
